items.reviewerNotes: Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Brown tourist destination sign with white pictogram and direction arrow; machine top match q0825 has identical intent (direction to tourist area). Source option C matches master correct meaning.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Red dashboard warning (exclamation in circle) indicates braking system abnormal. Machine top q0604 corresponds; source option D ('le système du frein est anormal') matches the master meaning.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Statement is false: do not speed across a level crossing on red. Machine top q0633 is the matching ROW item (correct = Wrong). Source 'No' corresponds to Wrong (option B).

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Image shows parking area with white rectangular markings, but candidates disagree (parallel/horizontal vs time-limited). French options include both generic 'place de stationnement' and 'place à durée limitée' — visual evidence insufficient to disambiguate. Rejected top matcher: Top candidate q0691 (horizontal/parallel parking) is plausible but other candidates (q0653 time-limited) are close; options don't align cleanly, so unresolved.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Blue circular sign with white car pictogram indicates an indicative/vehicle-related sign type. Machine q0789 labels it 'indicative sign' (option C) which matches the source option C.

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Blue circular sign with red border and red X usually means 'no stopping/no parking', but French options mix nuanced distinctions (temporary/long-term/no parking). Candidate matches are weak/conflicting — do not assign. Rejected top matcher: Top candidate q0787 (no passing) does not align with visual semantics; ambiguity between 'no parking' vs 'no stopping' in options prevents safe mapping.

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Yellow triangular warning sign with splitting arrows likely warns of branching/obstacle and may indicate bypass left/right, but candidate pool shows mixed interpretations (bypass right/left, two-way, merging). Insufficient disambiguation to approve an existing qid. Rejected top matcher: Top candidate q0785 (bypass from right) is plausible but not definitive; visual + option set ambiguous.

Codex low-risk createNewQuestion: Valid MCQ asking maximum speed through a dangerous curve (explicitly 30 km/h, source option C). No existing candidate clearly matches this exact context (top candidate refers to railway crossing), so create new question and map answer to source C. Rejected top matcher: Top candidate q0382 concerns railway crossing (different context) despite sharing numeric answer; therefore not appropriate to approve.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Blue mandatory sign showing U-turn arrow. Machine top q0756 meaning 'U-turn' matches directly. Source option A 'faire demi-tour' corresponds to master correct answer.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Statement about stopping on the highway shoulder to wait during diversion/control is false. Candidate q0021 closely matches the statement and is marked Wrong; select existing q0021 and map to source 'No' (B). Rejected top matcher: Top-ranked candidate q0005 is related but less specific; q0021 (rank 2) better matches the exact wording/intent.

Codex medium-risk createNewQuestion: Image clearly shows a windshield icon with wavy lines and a downward arrow (windshield defogger). No existing candidate qid unambiguously matches this defogger indicator; create new. Source correct = 'Yes' (A). Rejected top matcher: Top machine match (q0528) describes high-beam indicator which conflicts with the visual semantics; not appropriate.

Codex medium-risk createNewQuestion: Blue rectangular sign with white bus symbol and downward arrow indicates lane reserved for public transport buses. Top machine candidate favors BRT in its key; candidates conflict. Create new to preserve exact localized wording (A). Rejected top matcher: Top machine candidate q0819's correct option is 'BRT vehicles', which does not clearly match the localized French phrasing 'voie réservée aux bus de transport en commun'.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Visual (red light, POV) and prompt match q0849 which prohibits exceeding the stop line when going straight. The master correct (can not exceed the stop line) corresponds to source option A.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Yellow triangular sign with pedestrian figure indicates a pedestrian crossing. q0658's meaning 'crosswalk' matches the French source 'passage pour piétons' (A). Some candidate qids use slightly different phrasing ('watch for pedestrians'), so selected q0658 as best match. Rejected top matcher: Top machine candidate q0712 labels the sign as 'watch for pedestrians' which is similar but not the exact localized answer; chose q0658 which explicitly corresponds to 'crosswalk'.

Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Text-only legal MCQ about fleeing after causing accident with serious injuries or deaths. Candidate qids conflict (some indicate 3~7 years, others >7 years) and the source extraction has no key. Cannot confidently map to an existing qid or pick a correct option without authoritative statute mapping. Rejected top matcher: Top machine match (q0515) suggests '3~7 years' but other candidates (e.g., q0471) indicate different sentencing; legal nuance prevents safe automatic approval.

Codex medium-risk createNewQuestion: Image shows blue rectangular chevron/delineator plates indicating a curve (chevrons pointing left). Local option B 'balise de virage' matches the visual semantics. No candidate qid clearly and unambiguously matches this exact sign meaning; create new. Rejected top matcher: Top machine candidate q0737 refers to lane-direction arrows rather than chevron curve markers; not a reliable match.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Image of police officer hand signals; source answer 's'arrêter' (stop) corresponds to q0899 master answer 'stop'. In the localized option order, 'stop' is source letter C, so map to C.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: ROW item about sentencing for causing serious injury; q0187's statement matches the source phrasing that such an offender may be subject to imprisonment less than 3 years (Right). Source 'Yes' corresponds to A.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Text-only MCQ about acceleration lane speed. q0142's correct value is 60 km/h which corresponds to source option D (60 km/h). Good match.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Statement about avoiding overtaking at night and using alternating high/low beams to signal matches q0050 (Right). Source 'Yes' corresponds to A.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Statement denies permission to drive a short distance after drinking. Top candidate q0198 encodes the same ROW item (answer = Wrong). French options A=Yes, B=No so correct localized key is B.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Prompt matches ROW q0201 about inspecting overflowed/submerged bridge and passing slowly only if safe. Extracted answer = Yes corresponds to option A.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Statement about violating traffic lights incurring 6-point penalty matches q0348 (Right). Localized Yes = A.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Image shows blue rectangular sign with car + driver and passenger (HOV). q0793 corresponds to 'special lane for multi-passenger vehicles'. Source option C matches that meaning. Some candidate matches (q0686) conflict so confidence reduced.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Sentence recommends honking and overtaking in bad weather — unsafe and marked Wrong by q0081. Localized No = B.

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Image shows three blue panels with arrows (left/straight/right) and Chinese text. Source options (various 'avertissement') are ambiguous relative to existing candidates; cannot confidently map to a single existing qid or option.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Green highway signs with route numbers and arrows indicate highway location/direction. q0759 ('highway location and direction indication') fits; source option C matches that meaning.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Red engine-shaped dashboard lamp: item q0543 states continuous illumination means engine control system failure (Right). Source extracted answer = Yes → option A.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Blue circular sign with three white arrows forming a circle = roundabout sign. q0718 corresponds to 'running the roundabout'. Localized option D matches.
Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Blue circular horn symbol indicates mandatory horn (sound). q0657 encodes 'should honk'. Source first option 'obligation de klaxonner' corresponds to option A.

Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Image shows a right-pointing guide arrow and the source correct answer B indicates right; top machine match (q0860) indicates left-turn/straight semantics — conflicting candidates and option-set mismatch. Do not auto-assign qid. Rejected top matcher: Top matcher q0860 describes left/straight arrow semantics that contradict the visual evidence (arrow points right).
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Prompt and wording match q0274 (driver causing property damage may be sentenced to <3 years). ROW true -> French 'Yes' = A.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Statement equals q0237 (must not exceed posted speed); ROW true -> French 'Yes' = A.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Image shows pedestrians on a crosswalk and prompt matches q0355 (stop and yield). ROW true -> French 'Yes' = A.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Prompt matches q0186; correct master answer is to slow and yield. Source option D corresponds to that meaning, so map to source letter D.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Sign is a green highway guide board with distance ('4 km') and meaning 'next exit ahead' — q0673 is the matching highway-exit-ahead item; source option A matches that meaning.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Image shows two continuous yellow center lines; q0725 covers solid/broken yellow center lines — the impassable (no crossing the solid line) meaning matches source option B.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Statement matches q0246 (opening vehicle doors must not obstruct other traffic); ROW true -> French 'Yes' = A.

Codex medium-risk createNewQuestion: Image clearly shows a yellow lane marking with a taxi symbol; no top candidate in the provided matches corresponds to a taxi-lane marking. Create new localized item; correct source answer A (taxi). Rejected top matcher: Top candidates refer to dashboard indicators (open trunk/doors) and do not match the road-marking taxi symbol, so cannot reuse them.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Prompt and image (railway crossing warning) match q0189 which states you should NOT accelerate to cross; ROW false -> French 'No' = B.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Visual shows a light control lever position. Candidate q0562 explicitly: 'Rear fog light lights when the light switch is at this position.' Source asks if rear fog lights are on — matches meaning. Source correct A (Yes) corresponds to master Right. Rejected top matcher: Machine top match (q0528) describes high beam indicator, which conflicts with rear-fog semantics; q0562 is a better visual/semantic match.

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Source states a 6-point penalty for reversing/going wrong way/U-turn on highway. Top candidate (q0297) is similar but several candidate signals conflict (master marks Wrong). Legal/point mapping unclear from candidates — require human verification of correct penalty.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Prompt and options match q0440 (which also lists 'fire truck on duty' as the vehicle not to overtake). Source option B = fire truck on duty aligns with master correct answer.
Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: q0245 states prohibition to stop/park within 50 m of a narrow road under 4 m — directly matches the French source. Source Yes = A corresponds to master Right.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Multiple candidate masters (q0371, q0449) indicate 12 points for deliberately hiding/soiling/incorrectly displaying a plate. Source option A is '12' — maps to the correct master answer (12 points).
Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Conservative unresolved decision because evidence was insufficient.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Candidates (notably q0421) mark failure to affix a plate as a 12-point penalty. Source option D is '12' and aligns with those masters. Some candidate noise exists; human check advisable. Rejected top matcher: Top-ranked candidate in list (q0981) addresses forged/altered driver's license (different concept) so it was deprioritized in favor of q0421 which specifically covers missing/unstuck plates.

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Prompt about police right to immobilize a vehicle whose inspection certificate belongs to another car. Candidate list is low-confidence and semantically varied; no clear exact master match found—keep unresolved for legal verification.

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Statement 'driver must drive a vehicle model authorized by their license' is plausible but candidate matches are low-score and not directly equivalent; cannot safely map to an existing qid — keep unresolved for human review.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: q0970: 'turn slightly to the right, keep a safe horizontal distance' matches source choices. Source option C 'ralentir et serrer à droite' (slow down and keep to right) best corresponds to master correct behavior.
